name: Sarah M.
text: My Golden sheds like crazy. After one de-shedding session here, my couch was fur-free for almost five weeks. Genuinely shocked.
headline: Five weeks fur-free.

name: David K.
text: They got my Standard Poodle's Continental clip exactly right on the first try. Most groomers need two or three attempts. These folks know breed cuts.
headline: Knew the breed cut.

name: Brittany L.
text: Brought our 14-week-old Lab mix in terrified he'd hate it. He walked out wagging. Now he pulls toward the door when we drive past.
headline: Pulls toward the door now.

name: Marcus T.
text: I bring both dogs on the same morning and they're done within two hours. The price is exactly what they quote. No surprise add-ons.
headline: No surprise add-ons.
